content: Phase 1 — PROJECT SCAFFOLD: Initialize Next.js 14 project with App Router, Tailwind CSS, ESLint, Prettier, session logger, .env.local, Vercel deployment.

Phase 1 scaffold complete: Created Next.js 14 app with App Router, Tailwind CSS, ESLint + Prettier, session-log.json with logger utility at /lib/logger.js, and .env.local with Supabase placeholder keys. Git repo initialized. Ready for Vercel deployment setup.
Phase 1 complete. GitHub repo: https://github.com/vitragparekh/ludo-app. Vercel project: https://vercel.com/vitragparekhs-projects/ludo-app. Deployment is live.
Phase 2 — IDENTITY: Build guest identity with name input, avatar picker, localStorage persistence, top bar, and duplicate name handling.

Phase 2 complete: Built /identify page with name input (max 20 chars, no special chars), 8 color avatar picker with initials preview, localStorage persistence under ludo_identity key, auto-redirect to /lobby if identity exists, TopBar component showing avatar + name + Change link, and addDuplicateSuffix utility for Phase 3 room join logic.
Phase 3 — ROOM SYSTEM: Build lobby, create-room, join-room, and /room/[code] waiting room with Supabase Realtime.

Phase 3 complete: Built /lobby with Create Room and Join Room buttons, /create-room with 2/3/4 player toggle, /join-room with 6-char code input (supports ?code= query param from share links), /room/[code] waiting room with live player list via Supabase Realtime, room code copy/share, manager Start Game button, leave room functionality, and duplicate name handling on join.
Phase 4 — LUDO BOARD: Render SVG board, piece overlay, touch interaction, dice, turn indicator, Supabase Realtime sync.

Phase 4 complete: Built programmatic SVG Ludo board with 15x15 grid, 52 main track tiles, 4 home columns, 4 home bases. Pieces render with player colors, stacking offsets for same-tile. Selection ring + pulsing glow for valid moves. Dice with shake animation. Turn indicator banner. All game state synced via Supabase Realtime.
Phase 5 — GAME LOGIC: Full Ludo rules — entry on 6, clockwise movement, capture, safe tiles, home column, exact center roll, win detection, server-side validation.

Phase 5 complete: All Ludo rules implemented. Pieces enter on 6, move clockwise, capture opponents (except on safe tiles), enter home column after full circuit, need exact roll for center. Server-side move validation via /api/move route prevents cheating. Winner screen with Play Again. Game state initialized on room start by manager.
Phase 6 — POLISH & MOBILE UX: Sound effects, Wake Lock, PWA, mobile layout, loading skeletons.

Phase 6 complete: Added Web Audio API sound effects (dice roll, piece move) with mute toggle in top bar. Wake Lock API keeps screen awake during active games. PWA manifest.json + service worker for home screen install. Loading skeleton components. Viewport meta prevents zoom. Touch-first with 44px min tap targets throughout.
Created placeholder files for future phases: /app/leaderboard/page.tsx, /app/team-game/page.tsx, /lib/supabase-stats.ts
